userUtterance.text: I am logging in as the CFO.

agentUtterance.text: Welcome! It's great to have you here. Since you're logged in as the CFO, I've tailored my tools for your executive workflow. I can help you review transactions currently on hold or perform a secure vector search against the Oracle@Google Cloud Master Service Agreement. How can I assist you today?

userUtterance.text: What are the penalties for missing the SLA in the Google Cloud contract?

content.text: Section 4.2: Any failure to maintain 99.99% uptime targets for consecutive quarters results in a 15% service credit refund.

agentUtterance.text: Based on the Google Cloud Master Service Agreement, Section 4.2 states that any failure to maintain our 99.99% uptime target for consecutive quarters results in a 15% service credit refund.

playbookOutput.executionSummary: CFO logged in and audited Google Cloud SLA penalties successfully.
